overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character exploring a vast, dimly lit gothic library with stone architecture, towering bookshelves, and candlelight. The character ascends stairs, walks through corridors, and explores multiple levels of the grand interior space.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase and corridor in gothic castle

agents.ego_description: walking up stone stairs and along the upper corridor, passing wall-mounted candle sconces

notable_agents.action: stationary figure in dark robes standing against the corridor wall

entered.detail: wide stone steps with worn surfaces ascending through the corridor
large ornate arched window with intricate metal tracery at the end of the corridor
carved stone balustrade lining the staircase edge
metal wall-mounted candle holders providing warm flickering light

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a stone staircase in a narrow, dimly lit gothic corridor. Warm candlelight from wall sconces illuminates the stone architecture, with a large ornate window visible at the far end of the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle corridor leading to library entrance

events.description: character walks through the arched doorway into the larger library interior

agents.ego_description: walking through the corridor and passing through the doorway threshold into the library space

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing still against the wall near the doorway

entered.detail: stone archway marking the transition between corridor and library
interior space beyond the door illuminated with green ambient light
decorative wall hanging with heraldic designs

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds through a stone corridor lined with tapestries and candle sconces, passing a stationary NPC. At the end of the corridor, the character walks through an arched doorway into a green-lit interior space.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level of grand library with bookshelves

events.description: entering the vast library space with towering bookshelves and scattered book piles

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper level of the library, observing the bookshelves and seating areas

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling wooden bookshelves packed with volumes reaching to the high ceiling
piles of books and papers strewn across the floor in disarray
massive ornate chandelier hanging from the ceiling with multiple candle branches
stone fireplace with glowing embers and a warm fire
high-backed leather armchairs arranged near the fireplace for reading

segments.scene_description: The character explores the upper level of a vast gothic library, walking past floor-to-ceiling bookshelves and scattered piles of books. A seating area with leather chairs near a fireplace is visible to the right, while a grand chandelier hangs in the center of the space.

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the massive chandelier and vaulted ceiling high above

agents.ego_description: walking along the balcony edge looking down at the lower level, then gazing upward at the ornate ceiling architecture

entered.detail: ornate stone balustrade marking the edge of the upper level overlooking the atrium
ground floor of the library visible below with additional bookshelves and reading areas
high vaulted stone ceiling with intricate architectural details

segments.scene_description: The character moves along a balcony overlooking the library's lower level, revealing the full height of the multi-story space. The camera tilts upward to gaze at an enormous chandelier and the vaulted ceiling far above, emphasizing the grand scale of the architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: library reading area with lit fireplace

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing the lit fireplace and surrounding seating area with books

entered.detail: active fireplace with bright flames and glowing embers providing warm light
dark leather reading chairs positioned near the fireplace
wooden table with lit candles and scattered books beside the chairs

segments.scene_description: The character moves to a cozy reading area featuring a brightly lit fireplace, leather armchairs, and a side table with candles. The warm firelight contrasts with the cool ambient lighting of the surrounding bookshelves.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, dimly lit gothic corridor into the expansive, multi-level grandeur of a vast library. It begins as the character ascends a stone staircase illuminated by warm wall sconces, moving past an ornate window and through a tapestry-lined passage before passing a stationary figure. As the character walks through an arched doorway, the scene shifts into a green-lit interior space filled with floor-to-ceiling bookshelves and scattered piles of books. The camera then glides along a high balcony to reveal the full scale of the multi-story architecture, tilting upward toward a massive chandelier and the vaulted ceiling far above. Finally, the movement settles into a cozy reading nook where the cool ambient light of the library gives way to the warm, flickering glow of a brightly lit fireplace and leather armchairs.
